falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 70 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score indicates a confirmed blowoff phase, contradicting the current UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A divergence from the historical pattern invalidates the basis for the current UNKNOWN call.

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would refute the HOLD signal and suggest a new trend, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
